diagrams.title: Three Set Venn Diagram for PIE
diagrams.description: Shows how PIE works with three sets by adding and subtracting overlaps
elements: Regions A∩B only, A∩C only, B∩C only
diagrams.purpose: Visualize why we add single sets, subtract pairwise, add triple - to count each region exactly once

diagrams.title: Derangement Convergence to 1/e
diagrams.description: Graph showing D(n)/n! oscillating and converging to 1/e
elements: Oscillating curve approaching from above and below
Points for n=1 to n=10 showing convergence
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how derangement probability approaches 1/e as n grows

diagrams.title: Onto Function as Box Filling
diagrams.description: Representing onto functions as distributing m balls into n boxes with no empty boxes
elements: n boxes representing target set elements
Highlighting requirement that every box gets at least one ball
diagrams.purpose: Understand counting of onto functions through the box model and PIE exclusion of empty boxes
